description_long: This is a stone sculpture of a robed human figure standing on a tall, rectangular pedestal. The figure appears to be holding an object, possibly a cross or staff, close to its chest with both hands. The sculpture is detailed, with visible folds in the robe and a distinct facial expression, suggesting a religious or historical theme. The pedestal is weathered and sits on a square base with moss or grass around its edges, indicating outdoor placement. The entire structure is monochromatic, primarily in shades of gray and white, with some discoloration from exposure to the elements. The base is broad and solid, providing stability to the tall, slender figure above.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a robed human figure holding an object, mounted on a tall pedestal with a mossy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face and both hands of the figure holding an object close to the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure and the depth of the robe's folds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe and the pedestal, with no visible facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the object held in the hands from a different angle.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure holding an object
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors, likely in a park or garden, as indicated by the moss and grass around the base.
